query: SELECT ti.template_id, t.name as template_name, COUNT(*) as item_count FROM peppr_template_items ti JOIN peppr_service_templates t ON ti.template_id = t.id GROUP BY ti.template_id, t.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2C19S8bbifd7Eo1.072c8bfadc68 --database jKkhr27mS3Co8cU4bKqLWb --execute SELECT ti.template_id, t.name as template_name, COUNT(*) as item_count FROM peppr_template_items ti JOIN peppr_service_templates t ON ti.template_id = t.id GROUP BY ti.template_id, t.name;
